Internal Memorandum: MNPI/PDPA Handling for Proposed Acquisition by Helio Vista Holdings Ltd.
To: Board of Helio Vista Holdings Ltd. | From: Ms. Lin Wei, General Counsel | Date: 28 May 2026 | Contact: compliance@heliovista.sg
Helio Vista (a Mainboard issuer on SGX-ST) has executed a confidential non-binding term sheet with Riverbay Partners Pte. Ltd. to acquire Luminex Marine Pte. Ltd.; no SGXNet announcement has been made—treat all deal specifics as MNPI under SFA ss 218/219 and SGX Listing Manual Rule 703.
Selective disclosure: Until a Rule 703 announcement is released via SGXNet, no analyst pre-briefings or vendor communications beyond the clean team; all third parties must be wall-crossed and acknowledge confidentiality.
Blackout/closed period: Directors and Key Persons are restricted from dealing two weeks before the Q2 trading update and one month before FY results per our Securities Dealing Policy; the current blackout commences 10 June 2026.
Issuer-relative materiality: Preliminary modelling (with Mr. Desmond Khoo, CFO) indicates the acquisition could add ~6–8% to group EBITDA; this likely triggers materiality for Helio Vista and may warrant a trading halt coordinated with SGX RegCo immediately prior to signing.
Public-status precision: The Annual Report 2024 and the 3 April 2026 SGXNet press release on divestment of Helio Vista Logistics (public) are not MNPI; reference to those filings in investor conversations is permitted.
Adversarial note: A broad Harbor Ledger piece on “regional shipyard consolidation” is speculative and does not render our specific Luminex transaction generally available.
Capital-markets intersection: If a concurrent placement is pursued, the indicative price range, investor wall-cross lists, and bookrunner term sheet remain MNPI until the price determination announcement; align trading halt timing with immediate release on SGXNet.
Employment/PDPA: Draft headcount rationalisation schedules (28 roles in fleet operations) at Luminex are not stand-alone material but, combined with the acquisition, may be material; handle personal data via the PDPA business asset transaction exception with access limited to the clean team.
PDPA controls: Do not collect or circulate NRIC numbers or full residential addresses; minimise data, encrypt VDR exports, and route any queries to dpo@heliovista.sg.
Already announced items: The 15 May 2026 SGXNet update on vessel charter renewals and routine maintenance at Seaport East Yard are public and non-price sensitive; no additional disclosure is required.
Subtle context: The draft board pack contains a non-final SPA earn-out contour and unaudited April revenue for Luminex; both are MNPI and must remain within the Insider List.
Next steps: Prepare a Rule 703 announcement and, if leak risk escalates, request a trading halt; ensure all insiders acknowledge wall-crossing notices and comply with SFA and Listing Manual obligations during the closed period.
